product_outcome: Real visual-critic inputs retain fine mask evidence instead of collapsing every full diagnostic composite to one 448x448 image; future frozen corpora also contain deterministic target-focused zooms.

observed_failure.signature: Every case was called a boundary defect; response hashes repeated by context-tag group. Both retained valid controls were visually confirmed as correct visible right-arm masks.

root_causes.before: Each portrait, side-by-side diagnostic composite was padded into one 448x448 InternVL patch.
root_causes.after: Each composite uses the documented deterministic dynamic-resolution layout, bounded to six detail tiles plus one thumbnail; the two valid controls each produce 21 patches across three composites.

root_causes.before: The real-corpus builder passed the full image as crop_xyxy, so valid uncertainty_zoom panels duplicated full-frame overlays.
root_causes.after: Corpus v2 derives a padded crop from the union of exact target and candidate pixels, bounded to source geometry.

real_corpus_v2.visual_inspection: vcr_001_valid and vcr_007_valid focused overlays visibly retain the selected arm/hand boundary and surrounding owner/contact context.

verification.focused_tests: 35 passed for the dynamic runner wave; 23 passed for the focused-corpus wave

live_qualification.reason: The one-time token from the initial queued response was overwritten by an idempotent status replay after grant. The corrected wrapper retains the original process-local token; the unusable existing lease must be reconciled only through the coordinator authority.

remaining_acceptance: Run a current primary and independent-family model on the exact positive/negative corpus; both must satisfy unchanged role thresholds before any role promotion or 220-package batch authority.
